# `pytest-mpl`

`pytest-mpl` is a [pytest](https://docs.pytest.org) plugin to facilitate image comparison for [Matplotlib](http://www.matplotlib.org) figures.

For each figure to test, an image is generated and then subtracted from an existing reference image.
If the RMS of the residual is larger than a user-specified tolerance, the test will fail.
Alternatively, the generated image can be hashed and compared to an expected value.

For more information, see the [pytest-mpl documentation](https://pytest-mpl.readthedocs.io).

## Installation

```bash
pip install pytest-mpl
```

For detailed instructions, see the [installation guide](https://pytest-mpl.readthedocs.io/en/latest/installing.html) in the `pytest-mpl` docs.

## Usage

First, write test functions that create a figure.
These image comparison tests are decorated with `@pytest.mark.mpl_image_compare` and return the figure for testing:

```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pytest

@pytest.mark.mpl_image_compare
def test_plot():
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    ax.plot([1, 2])
    return fig
```

Then, generate reference images by running the test suite with the `--mpl-generate-path` option:

```bash
pytest --mpl-generate-path=baseline
```

Then, run the test suite as usual, but pass `--mpl` to compare the returned figures to the reference images:

```bash
pytest --mpl
```

By also passing `--mpl-generate-summary=html`, a summary of the image comparison results will be generated in HTML format:

```






html all

html filter

html result
```

For more information on how to configure and use `pytest-mpl`, see the [pytest-mpl documentation](https://pytest-mpl.readthedocs.io).

## Contributing

`pytest-mpl` is a community project maintained for and by its users.
There are many ways you can help!

- Report a bug or request a feature [on GitHub](https://github.com/matplotlib/pytest-mpl/issues)
- Improve the documentation or code

functions.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.status_class
documentation: Status to Bootstrap class.

functions.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.image_status_msg
documentation: Image status to status message.

functions.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.hash_status_msg
documentation: Hash status to status message.

functions.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.generate_summary_html
documentation:
Generate the HTML summary.

Parameters
----------
results : dict
    The `pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison._test_results` object.
results_dir : Path
    Path to the output directory.
hash_library : str, optional, default=None
    Filename of the generated hash library at the root of `results_dir`.
    Will be linked to in HTML if not None.

functions.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.generate_summary_basic_html
documentation:
Generate the basic HTML summary.

Parameters
----------
results : dict
    The `pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison._test_results` object.
results_dir : Path
    Path to the output directory.
hash_library : str, optional, default=None
    Filename of the generated hash library at the root of `results_dir`.
    Will be linked to in HTML if not None.

classes.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.Results

methods.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.Results.statistics
documentation: Generate a dictionary of summary statistics.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.Results.image_comparison
documentation: Whether at least one image comparison test or generation was performed.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.Results.hash_comparison
documentation: Whether at least one hash comparison test or generation was performed.

Data for the whole test run, used for providing data to the template.

Parameters
----------
results : dict
    The `pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison._test_results` object.
title : str
    Value for HTML <title>.

classes.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.Result

methods.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.Result.indexes
documentation: Dictionary with strings optimized for sorting.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.Result._status_sort
documentation: Status number. Higher means more issues.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.Result._rms_sort
documentation: RMS to 3 d.p. for sorting.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.Result.rms_str
documentation: RMS to show in template.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.summary.html.Result.badges
documentation: Additional badges to show beside overall status badge.

Result data for a single image test, used for providing data to the template.

Parameters
----------
name : str
    Full name of the test including modules.
item : dict
    Dictionary of summary results for a test in
    `pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison._test_results`.
id : str
    The test number in order collected. Numbers must be
    zero padded due to alphanumerical sorting.

documentation: Hashes an already opened file.

documentation: Remove non-path safe characters.

documentation: Generate a unique name for the hash for this test.

documentation: Intercept and store figures returned by test functions.

functions.name: pytest_mpl.plugin.get_compare
documentation: Return the mpl_image_compare marker for the given item.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison.generate_filename
documentation: Given a pytest item, generate the figure filename.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison.make_test_results_dir
documentation: Generate the directory to put the results in.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison.baseline_directory_specified
documentation: Returns `True` if a non-default baseline directory is specified.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison.get_baseline_directory
documentation:
Return a full path to the baseline directory, either local or remote.

Using the global and per-test configuration return the absolute
baseline dir, if the baseline file is local else return base URL.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison.obtain_baseline_image
documentation:
Copy the baseline image to our working directory.

If the image is remote it is downloaded, if it is local it is copied to
ensure it is kept in the event of a test failure.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison.generate_baseline_image
documentation: Generate reference figures.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison.generate_image_hash
documentation:
For a `matplotlib.figure.Figure`, returns the SHA256 hash as a hexadecimal
string.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison.compare_image_to_baseline
documentation: Compare a test image to a baseline image.

methods.name: pytest_mpl.plugin.ImageComparison.pytest_unconfigure
documentation: Save out the hash library at the end of the run.

classes.name: pytest_mpl.plugin.FigureCloser
documentation:
This is used in place of ImageComparison when the --mpl option is not used,
to make sure that we still close figures returned by tests.
